LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT AUDIONAMIX INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SECTION 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. COUNSEL GURA'S DECLARATION FAILS TO SPECIFY "THE MEANS BY WHICH" HE MET AND CONFERRED WITH COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS. (GURA DECL., PAR. 25; CCP 430.41(A)(3)(A).) ALL COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 430.41. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY MARCH 11, 2022. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS, CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/SRB)

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEXANDER BRENDON, Esq. of Novian & Novian, LLP (Tel: 310-553-1222) for plaintiff/crosss-defendant Audionamix, Inc.;
Atty. JOHN F. O'CONNOR, Esq. of Clark Hill LLP (Tel: 415-984-8500) for defendant/cross-complainant Stemit, Inc.

HEARING RE: CROSS-DEFENDANT AUDIONAMIX INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT.

Matter is argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification as to the third cause of action, as follows:

Audionamix's demurrer is overruled as to Stemit's first cause of action for breach of contract.

Audionamix's demurrer is overruled as to Stemit's second cause of action for declaratory relief.

Audionamix's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to Stemit's third cause of action for fraudulent misrepresentation to permit Stemit to state specifically to whom the alleged representations were made.

Audionamix's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to Stemit's fourth cause of action for negligent misrepresentation, as it is barred by the economic loss rule.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/SRB)

DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT AUDIONAMIX INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION's DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT

Defendant's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Code Civ. Proc. section 430.41, which requires counsel to meet and confer in person or by telephone before a demurrer is filed. Counsel Gura's declaration fails to specify "the means by which" he met and conferred with counsel for Plaintiffs. (Gura Decl., par. 25; CCP 430.41(a)(3)(A).) All counsel are ordered to comply with Code Civ. Proc. sec. 430.41. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by March 11, 2022.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)
